title: Avanza inleder expansion: "Naturligt första steg"
summary_md:
# Avanza inleder expansion: "Naturligt första steg"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-21  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

## Summary

Two Dagen med DI episodes from 2026-04-21:

**Investor AB Q1** (Christian Sederholm, CEO): NAV +3%, total return +7% vs OMXS30 -1%.
Portfolio companies navigating geopolitical disruptions — logistics headwinds visible but
no significant P&L impact yet. Investor bought Atlas Copco and EQT at what it considers
attractive levels; sold some SEB to comply with regulatory ownership limits. CEO warns
cost inflation from Mideast conflict will show in P&Ls if conflict extends further.

**Avanza Q1 record results**: 55,000 new customers (vs ~40K late 2024), net inflow 16.5B SEK,
record quarterly profit. Denmark expansion announced for H2 2027 at 120–150M SEK cost.
CEO: building new platform rather than adapting Swedish one; AI-driven development cost
reduction makes this viable. Stock fell on Denmark news (market wanted Germany?).

Both companies are large-cap; no Swedish small/mid-cap universe signals.

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
